subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Praise be to God that the fragrances of the All-Merciful are being wafted abroad and the renown of the Abhá Kingdom is being spread [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الحمد لله نفحات رحمان در انتشار است و صیت ملکوت ابهی در
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @love of God
